title: Is Zepto down? Users hit by mass outage, face disruptions on app and website
summary: Zepto, the quick-commerce platform, appeared to suffer some outages on Sunday, with users reporting issues with its app and website, according to Downdetector.

title: Instagram, Facebook down? Thousands of users report mass outage; netizens say ‘no posts coming up on feed after refresh’
summary: Many users encountered error messages while attempting to log in to Facebook's desktop site. According to outage-tracking platform DownDetector, reports of issues with Instagram and Facebook occurred in New Delhi, Ahmedabad, Mumbai, Pune, Kolkata and other cities in India.

title: AI memory shortage threatens to trigger geopolitical strain, warns SK Group chief
summary: SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won warned that the global shortage of artificial intelligence memory chips could escalate into a geopolitical issue, predicting that memory demand will far outpace supply through 2027 despite aggressive capacity expansion efforts.

summary: Chinese DRAM maker ChangXin Memory Technologies is throwing its hat into the ring with a roughly $8.5 billion initial public offering as it seeks to challenge the dominance of Samsung Electronics, SK hynix and Micron Technology, The Korea Herald reported.

title: AI-driven chip boom fuels 47% surge in entry-level semiconductor hiring in South Korea
